title: AntiPluginsCommand
body:
**Block `/plugins`, `/pl`, and other commands to hide your server's plugin list!** ### **📌 Features** ✔ **Blocks all variants** of `/plugins` and `/pl` (including `bukkit:pl`, `minecraft:plugins`, etc.). ✔ **Customizable deny message** – Change the message players see when trying to use blocked commands. ✔ **Permission bypass** – Admins with `apc.bypass` can still use the commands. ✔ **Lightweight & efficient** – No lag, no unnecessary checks. ### **📥 Download & Installation** 1. **Download** the latest plugin version. 2. **Place** the file in your server's `plugins/` folder. 3. **Restart** the server. ### **⚙ Configuration** Edit `plugins/AntiPluginsCommand/config.yml` to customize:
```yaml # List of commands to block (case-insensitive) blocked-commands: - plugins - pl - bukkit:pl - bukkit:plugins # Message shown when a command is blocked deny-message: "§cThis command is disabled." ```
### **🔒 Permissions** - `apc.bypass` – Allows players to bypass the block (default: `op`). ### **📜 Commands** None. Just install and it works! ### **🛠 Compatibility** - **Servers**: Paper, Spigot, Bukkit (1.21.4). - **Java**: 21. ### **❓ FAQ** **Q: Does this work with LuckPerms or other permission plugins?** → **Yes!** It respects permissions and won’t interfere with other plugins. **Q: Can I add more commands to block?** → **Yes!** Just edit `config.yml` and add them under `blocked-commands`. **Q: Will this slow down my server?** → **No.** The plugin only checks commands when they’re run. --- **📌 Get it now and keep your server plugins hidden from players!**
